top_signals.title: FBI says billion-dollar criminal network included cargo theft
top_signals.summary:
Federal prosecutors extradited Abdullah Anwar from Qatar to face conspiracy charges, but the FBI's reference to cargo theft rings raised new questions. Public court records reviewed by FreightWaves describe an alleged network that moved stolen Apple and Samsung electronics, Yeti products and other consumer goods through an international export operation.

The post FBI says billion-dollar criminal network included cargo theft appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MoonPay buys Glide to bolster crypto deposits infrastructure
top_signals.summary: MoonPay acquired Glide, a crypto infrastructure startup founded by former Robinhood Wallet engineers, to expand cross-chain crypto deposit infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
